goal: Refine pixel-terminal anvil visual identity and make interactive TUI feel alive with operational run data
changes: Refined anvil_mark() with wider, more proportional forged-iron anvil (improved horn, waist, base platform, leg spacing)
Added active_run_ids field to InteractiveDashboard (up to 5 run IDs) sourced from active request rows
render_interactive_home now emits dynamic 'Active run IDs:' line when runs are live

evidence.interactive_cli_baseline: existing interactive home, slash commands, conversational routing confirmed operational
evidence.tui_operational_data: active run IDs now visible in dashboard, TUI feels more alive
evidence.anvil_visual_identity: refined pixel-terminal hybrid anvil with improved proportions
